title_cn: 随着人工智能支出焦虑的加剧，芯片股受到打击：市场结束
summary: A selloff in chipmakers dragged down stocks amid concerns over whether massive artificial-intelligence investments will justify lofty valuations, with a resurgence in geopolitical risks also weighing on sentiment.

title: Sweetgreen Shares Slide to Three-Month Low on Cyclosporiasis Outbreak Fears
title_cn: 由于担心环孢子虫病爆发，Sweetgreen 股价跌至三个月低点
summary: Sweetgreen Inc. has lost more than a quarter of its market value in just four days as investors dump the stock due to fears about outbreak of cyclosporiasis — an intestinal infection caused by parasites in raw produce and water that has sickened thousands across the US.

title: Gold Falls as US-Iran Hostilities Rekindles Fed Hike Bets
title_cn: 美国与伊朗的敌对行动重燃美联储加息押注，金价下跌
summary: Gold declined as escalating tensions in the Middle East rekindled expectations that the Federal Reserve may need to hike interest rates to contain stubborn inflation.

title: Bonds Have a Big Tech Problem of Their Own
title_cn: 债券本身也有一个很大的技术问题
summary: Concentration risk is becoming a thing.

title: Bond Traders Bail on Fed Hike Bets on Softer Inflation Path
title_cn: 债券交易员放弃美联储加息押注通胀走软
summary: The bullish tone in the US bond market following two benign inflation reports has traders of interest-rate options scrambling to exit positions bought in anticipation of at least one rate hike by the Federal Reserve this year.

title: Why IPOs of Tiny Foreign Companies Have Vanished in US
title_cn: 为什么小型外国公司在美国的首次公开募股消失了

title: Vitol Said to Be in Talks to Sell Shale Unit to Carnelian, EnCap
title_cn: 据称，维托尔正在洽谈将页岩油业务出售给红玉髓、EnCap
summary: Vitol Group is in late stage talks to sell its shale oil venture VTX Energy Partners LLC to a consortium of two private equity buyers - Carnelian Energy Capital and EnCap Investments, a deal that would mark a scaling back for the trader in US upstream oil and gas production.

title: SpaceX Post-Listing Collapse Threatens IPO Market’s AI Euphoria
title_cn: SpaceX 上市后倒闭威胁 IPO 市场的人工智能热情
summary: SpaceX’s fall from its post-listing peak to below its IPO price in just a month poured cold water on the market for newly public companies, dragging a key gauge of this year’s debuts down with it.

title: A Sports-Betting ETF Is Like Old-School Stockpicking
title_cn: 体育博彩 ETF 就像老式选股
summary: Proposed prediction market ETFs risk missing the point

title: Latest Oil Market News and Analysis for July 16
title_cn: 7 月 16 日最新石油市场新闻和分析
summary: Oil dipped, though remains higher for the week, as traders balanced profit-taking with concerns about disruptions to Middle East flows.

title: Oil Traders Crowd Into Cheap TACO Hedge as Iran War Amps Up
title_cn: 随着伊朗战争加剧，石油交易商纷纷涌入廉价的 TACO 对冲
summary: An unusual options trade is becoming a favored hedge against the risks of sudden U-turns in US President Donald Trump’s stance on Iran, a dynamic that has repeatedly whipsawed markets in recent months.

title: China Beef Curbs Start Rippling Across Brazil Meat Industry
title_cn: 中国牛肉限制开始波及巴西肉类行业
summary: Brazil is starting to feel the impact of China’s beef import quota, with lower shipments to the country’s largest overseas market reverberating across the entire supply chain.

title: Korea ETF’s (EWY) Record Inflow Fuels SK Hynix Proxy Play
title_cn: 韩国 ETF (EWY) 创纪录的资金流入推动 SK 海力士代理游戏
summary: A record inflow hit the largest US-listed South Korea exchange-traded fund, as investors seeking exposure to SK Hynix Inc. piled into the ETF as a proxy at a time when the chipmaker’s new American depositary receipts trade at a substantial premium to its local shares.

title: Chevron Plans to Sign Iraq Oil Accord, Seeks Hormuz Bypass
title_cn: 雪佛龙计划签署伊拉克石油协议，寻求绕过霍尔木兹海峡
summary: Chevron Corp. expects to sign accords with Iraq on Friday that will advance its negotiations about investing in large oil fields and a pipeline to bypass the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Emerging Currencies Dip as Dollar Gains Over Iran Worries
title_cn: 美元因伊朗担忧而上涨，新兴货币下跌
summary: Most developing-world currencies fell Thursday as renewed tensions in the Middle East sparked a flight to haven assets, pushing the dollar higher.

title: Fed’s Logan Favors Modestly Higher Rates to Lower Inflation
title_cn: 美联储洛根赞成适度提高利率以降低通胀
summary: Federal Reserve Bank of Dallas President Lorie Logan called for higher interest rates, saying inflation does not appear to be heading sustainably back to the central bank’s 2% target.

title: Apollo Bets on Mexico With $20 Billion Target for Private Credit
title_cn: Apollo 押注墨西哥 200 亿美元私人信贷目标
summary: Apollo Global Management Inc. plans to put as much as $20 billion to work financing projects in Mexico as the giant asset manager seeks new outlets for its private credit business.

title: Balbec Secures $930 Million in Commitments for Asset-Based Credit Fund
title_cn: Balbec 获得 9.3 亿美元的资产信贷基金承诺
summary: Alternative asset manager Balbec Capital LP has obtained commitments of more than $930 million for its latest flagship fund that will invest in a variety of asset-based credit, according to a filing on Thursday.

title: Paschi Casts Doubts On Intesa Bid, Urges Studying BPM Plan
title_cn: Paschi 对 Intesa 竞标表示怀疑，敦促研究 BPM 计划
summary: Banca Monte dei Paschi di Siena SpA expressed broad concerns over a takeover bid by Intesa Sanpaolo SpA while highlighting perceived benefits in a rough rival pitch presented by Banco BPM SpA.

title: Podcast: Tokenization, Digital Twins and the Future of ETFs
title_cn: 播客：代币化、数字孪生和 ETF 的未来
summary: On this episode of Trillions, we explore how this government transformation will affect stocks, bonds and exchange-traded funds.

title: DeepMind CEO to Lobby Washington on Plan for Group to Vet AI Models
title_cn: DeepMind 首席执行官游说华盛顿制定小组审查人工智能模型的计划
summary: Earlier this week, Google DeepMind Chief Executive Officer Demis Hassabis unveiled a proposal for a new international watchdog that would do “rigorous” tests and reviews of cutting-edge AI models before release.

title: DeepMind CEO Rallies Support for International Group to Vet AI Models
title_cn: DeepMind 首席执行官呼吁国际组织审查人工智能模型
summary: Demis Hassabis intends to hold meetings about his proposal with US policymakers.

title: Netflix Pledges More Programs, AI to Reverse Slowing Growth
title_cn: Netflix 承诺推出更多节目和人工智能以扭转增长放缓的局面
summary: Netflix Inc. forecast a second consecutive quarter of slowing sales growth, results that will feed investor anxiety about the streaming giant’s future.

title: An Alien-Abduction Show Lands Among the Top 50 Podcasts in the US
title_cn: 外星人绑架节目跻身美国播客前 50 名
summary: The video program has become a breakthrough hit with millions of YouTube followers and 30,000 Patreon subscribers

title: New Mexico Denies Gas Pipeline Permit for Oracle Data Center
title_cn: 新墨西哥州拒绝为 Oracle 数据中心提供天然气管道许可证
summary: New Mexico regulators have rejected, for a second time, applications for a natural gas pipeline across state lands that would supply power systems at a planned Oracle Corp. data center project.

title: Palm Beach Rejects Data Center Near Trump’s Mar-a-Lago Club
title_cn: 棕榈滩拒绝特朗普海湖庄园附近的数据中心
summary: Palm Beach County commissioners rejected a proposal to build a digital infrastructure hub to house AI data centers and warehouses, voting in line with the ardent opposition from local residents.

title: Hollywood Sci-Fi Lot Pitched as Site to Make Real Space-Age Weapons
title_cn: 好莱坞科幻片被定位为制造真正太空时代武器的场地
summary: Manhattan Beach Studios has been the site of filming for projects including Star Wars: The Mandalorian, a TV series about a heavily armed bounty hunter in a galaxy far, far away.

title: DHS Seizes 30,000 Mobile SIM Cards in Effort to Stop Phone Fraud
title_cn: 国土安全部扣押 30,000 张移动 SIM 卡以阻止电话欺诈
summary: US Homeland Security Investigations recently seized more than 30,000 mobile phone SIM cards from sites around the country, in an operation that the agency says dismantled infrastructure criminals used in widespread telephone fraud.

title: Google Gemini Launch Delayed as Tech Falls Short of Internal Goals
title_cn: 谷歌 Gemini 发布因技术未能达到内部目标而推迟
summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Google is months behind schedule on delivering Gemini 3.5 Pro, its most powerful flagship AI model, because the company has been taking time to try to improve its capabilities, particularly in coding, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Nasdaq 100 Slides as TSMC Results Revives AI Spending Concerns
title_cn: 台积电业绩重燃人工智能支出担忧，纳斯达克 100 指数下滑
summary: US stocks declined on Thursday as Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co.’s results failed to boost artificial-intelligence stocks and traders assessed a worsening situation in the Middle East.

title: Oracle Risks Falling Behind in AI Race as Spending Binge Bites
title_cn: 由于支出狂潮，甲骨文面临在人工智能竞赛中落后的风险
summary: Oracle Corp.’s ambitions to dominate the artificial intelligence buildout are running into a key hurdle: funding a spending spree without further damaging its credit standing.

title: GameStop CEO Says Physical Video-Game Sales Are ‘Irrelevant’ to Business
title_cn: GameStop首席执行官表示实体视频游戏销售与商业“无关”
summary: GameStop Corp. Chief Executive Officer Ryan Cohen dismissed concerns about the demise of physical discs for video games, insisting that those sales make up a small part of the company’s overall business and reiterating that his long-term strategy is to focus on gaming collectables and purchasing e-commerce giant eBay Inc.

title: Digi Spanish Unit Shares Close Lower After €287 Million IPO
title_cn: Digi 西班牙单位股价在 2.87 亿欧元首次公开募股后收盘下跌
summary: Digi Spain Telecom SA shares closed lower in their debut in Spain on Thursday, after a rare initial public offering in the country.

title: Ryan Cohen Vows GameStop Will Pursue eBay Despite Offer Being Rebuffed
title_cn: 瑞安·科恩 (Ryan Cohen) 誓言 GameStop 将收购 eBay，尽管报价遭到拒绝
summary: GameStop Corp. Chief Executive Officer Ryan Cohen declined to say if he planned to raise his $56 billion offer for online auctioneer eBay Inc., but said “we’re coming for eBay one way or another.”

title: Verizon Cuts Store Workers in Reorganization Strategy
title_cn: Verizon 在重组战略中裁员
summary: Verizon Communications Inc. announced a round of layoffs Thursday that will impact about 3,000 employees in corporate-owned retail stores, the latest move in new Chief Executive Officer Dan Schulman’s plan to transform the mobile provider.

title: Carney Taps General Dynamics for $1.4 Billion Canada Armored Vehicle Deal
title_cn: 卡尼与通用动力公司签订价值 14 亿美元的加拿大装甲车交易
summary: Prime Minister Mark Carney announced the Canadian government is earmarking C$2 billion ($1.4 billion) over four years to build armored combat support vehicles in southwestern Ontario.

title: Visa Is Expanding Its Crypto Push With New Stablecoin Platform
title_cn: Visa 正在通过新的稳定币平台扩大其加密货币业务
summary: Visa Inc. unveiled a platform that lets financial firms issue, move and manage stablecoins, broadening the payments giant’s crypto offerings as banks and fintechs prepare for wider adoption of the digital tokens.

title: China-Led AI Body Enlists Global South States to Rival US
title_cn: 中国领导的人工智能机构邀请全球南方国家与美国竞争
summary: Twenty-nine countries including Russia have signed up to join the China-led World Artificial Intelligence Cooperation Organization, as Beijing’s plan to jostle with the US for influence over the emergence of artificial intelligence begins to take shape.

title: Sea Drone Maker Saronic to Build New Shipyard in South Texas
title_cn: 海上无人机制造商 Saronic 将在德克萨斯州南部建造新造船厂
summary: An Austin-based technology startup whose maritime drones were used by the US military in combat for the first time this week plans to build a $3.2 billion shipyard in South Texas.

title: Apple Nears Launch of OLED iPad Mini; New iPad Air and Base iPad in 2027
title_cn: 苹果即将推出 OLED iPad Mini； 2027 年新款 iPad Air 和 Base iPad
summary: Apple Inc. is preparing to introduce its biggest overhaul to the iPad mini in half a decade, giving new life to a product that’s popular with travelers and technology enthusiasts.

title: Trump Confronts Limits to US Power to Secure Strait of Hormuz
title_cn: 特朗普面临美国保护霍尔木兹海峡权力的限制
summary: Iran’s speedboats, missiles, drones and mines have shown they can still wreak havoc in the Strait of Hormuz, defying daily strikes from the most powerful navy in the world.

title: White House Helipad to Stop Copter from Burning Lawn, Navy Says
title_cn: 海军称白宫直升机停机坪可阻止直升机飞向燃烧的草坪
summary: The landing pad under construction on the White House South Lawn will allow the new Lockheed Martin Corp. VH-92 helicopter designed to carry the president to meet a key unmet performance requirement — not damaging the grass, the US Navy said.

title: US Launches New Strikes on Iran as Hormuz Traffic Slumps
title_cn: 霍尔木兹交通量下滑，美国对伊朗发动新的打击
summary: The US launched fresh strikes against Iran on Thursday, the fifth straight day of attacks, as hostilities across the Middle East continued to escalate and shipping traffic slumped in the critical Strait of Hormuz.

title: Mamdani Wants to Make It Easier for NYC Renters to Unionize
title_cn: Mamdani 希望让纽约市的租房者更容易加入工会
summary: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani wants to make it easier for tenants to organize in his latest efforts to address soaring housing costs.

title: White House Teleprompter Operator Investigated Over Kalshi Trading Allegations
title_cn: 白宫提词器操作员因卡尔希交易指控接受调查
summary: A White House teleprompter operator is under investigation by the Commodity Futures Trading Commission for allegedly profiting on prediction market wagers on Kalshi about President Donald Trump’s speeches, according to a person familiar with the matter.

title: Carney Defends Splitting Gordie Howe Bridge Profits With US for 15 Years
title_cn: 卡尼为戈迪·豪大桥 15 年来与美国的利润分割辩护
summary: Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney defended his decision to give the US a share of the profit from a new bridge between Ontario and Michigan, saying there will be little to no proceeds to split at first and arguing the project will help the economy in both countries.

title: GOP Blueprint to Spend Up to $95 Billion Advanced by House Panel
title_cn: 众议院小组将拨款高达 950 亿美元的共和党蓝图
summary: The House Budget Committee advanced a framework that would unlock as much as $95 billion for costs of the Iran war, aid for farmers, and other GOP priorities.

title: Dark Ships and Oman Transfers Indicate Hormuz Transits Continue
title_cn: 黑船和阿曼转运表明霍尔木兹转运仍在继续
summary: A handful of oil tankers were seen conducting ship-to-ship transfers off the coast of Oman, a sign that ships are continuing to sail through the Strait of Hormuz before offloading their cargoes onto other vessels after recent Iranian attacks.

title: Deadly ICE Shooting Jolts Already Chaotic Maine Senate Race
title_cn: 致命的 ICE 枪击事件扰乱了已经混乱的缅因州参议院竞选
summary: The Maine Senate race has been jolted yet again after the fatal shooting of a Colombian man by a federal agent this week, galvanizing Democrats against President Donald Trump’s immigration crackdown.

title: US Student Visa Holders Face New Restrictions Under DHS Rule
title_cn: 美国学生签证持有者面临国土安全部规则的新限制
summary: The Trump administration is scrapping a decades-old policy that allows international students and exchange visitors to remain in the US for as long as their studies last, replacing it with a four-year limit that will require many of them to seek federal permission to stay.

title: Zelenskyy Aims to Contain Anger Over Defense Minister Ouster
title_cn: 泽伦斯基旨在遏制对国防部长罢免的愤怒
summary: Volodymyr Zelenskyy said the ousted Ukrainian defense minister remained part of his team even as Mykhailo Fedorov insisted he’d turned down a position as a presidential adviser, deepening a rift within the country’s ruling elite at a pivotal moment in the war against Russia.

title: Hungary Probing Ex-Foreign Minister’s Russia Ties, Magyar Says
title_cn: 马扎尔称匈牙利正在调查前外交部长与俄罗斯的关系
summary: Hungarian Prime Minister Peter Magyar said an investigation is underway into former foreign minister Peter Szijjarto’s ties to Russia.

title: Vance Stokes Clash With Senate Over Trump Voter ID Legislation
title_cn: 万斯因特朗普选民身份立法与参议院发生冲突
summary: Vice President JD Vance publicly urged Republicans to attach White House-backed voter identification legislation to a partisan bill funding the Iran war, ramping up the administration’s election push just hours before President Donald Trump is expected to try to cast fresh doubt the 2020 vote he lost.

title: Iran-US Hostilities Worsen as Hormuz Shipping Traffic Falls
title_cn: 霍尔木兹海峡航运量下降，伊朗与美国的敌对行动加剧
summary: The US intensified strikes against Iran overnight, hitting an oil tanker near the country’s main export terminal as shipping traffic slumped through the critical Strait of Hormuz.

title: Trump, GOP Amass $1.1 Billion to Battle Democrats in Midterms
title_cn: 特朗普和共和党筹集 11 亿美元在中期选举中对抗民主党
summary: President Donald Trump and his Republican allies have amassed a $1.1 billion war chest ahead of the midterm elections, more than triple the amount of cash that the national Democratic Party has, according to the latest Federal Election Commission disclosures.

title: US 25% Tariffs on Brazil Risk Becoming an Election Gift to Lula
title_cn: 美国对巴西征收 25% 关税有可能成为送给卢拉的选举礼物
summary: The US decision to impose 25% tariffs on Brazil has reignited a trade dispute with President Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva’s government just months before October’s presidential election, potentially shaping the outcome of a deeply polarized race.

title: Iraq Says Basrah Oil Loadings Continue After Tanker Incident
title_cn: 伊拉克称油轮事件后巴士拉石油装载仍在继续
summary: Iraq said it continues to load oil onto tankers at its Basrah export installations in the Persian Gulf and that no damage had been sustained to a vessel while it loaded there.

title: Mahmood’s Economic ‘Blank Slate’ Key to Appeal as UK Chancellor
title_cn: 马哈茂德的经济“空白”成为英国财政大臣上诉的关键
summary: UK Home Secretary Shabana Mahmood’s edge over Energy Secretary Ed Miliband in the race to be appointed Andy Burnham’s Chancellor of the Exchequer appears to lie in one important quality: economically, she’s a blank slate.

title: Reid Hoffman Pumps $10 Million Into Talarico’s Senate Bid
title_cn: 里德·霍夫曼 (Reid Hoffman) 斥资 1000 万美元参与塔拉里科 (Talarico) 参议员竞选

title: UK Aims to Send Ukraine Pared-Down Ballistic Missile in 2027
title_cn: 英国计划于 2027 年向乌克兰发射精简型弹道导弹
summary: The UK has signed contracts with multiple companies to develop the country’s first ballistic missile in more than half a century in a bid to both support Ukraine and reduce Europe’s reliance on American weaponry.
